---
title: "Jan Hofmann"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:[Your Email]"
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/HofmannJ588
---

Welcome. I am a PhD student in Chemistry at Stony Brook University, focusing on materials chemistry, Metal-Organic Frameworks (MOFs), and structural analysis.

## Education
**Ph.D. in Chemistry** | Stony Brook University | *In Progress*
